case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANGEMENT vs. NORMAN. HARRICE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN. HARRICE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NORMAN. HARRICE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANGEMENT COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JEFF MARGUILES AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1423 QUINT ST, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED AS LONG AS DEF. COMPIES W/STIP. - $1,650 RENT & DAMAGES - DEF. TO PAY $450 BY C/C OR MONEY ORDER TO MR. MARGUILES BY 4-1-94, 4PM & $1200 BY NOON, 4-4-94 - DEF. TO MAKE RENTAL PMTS STARTING 5-1-94 THROUGH 10-1-94 TO MR. MARGUILES BY C/C OF MONEY ORDER WITH A 5DAY GRACE PERIOD - STARTING 4-1-94 MONTHLY RENT REDUCED $50 TO $400 UNTIL GARAGE DOOR IS REPAIRED - ACCEPTANCE BY PL. OF PARTIAL PMT DOESN'T FORF. PL. RIGHT TO EVICT - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS EXCEPT DEF. CLAIM OF DAMAGES TO ANTIQUE CAR & STORAGE COSTS- NO STAYS ON POSSESSION - IF DEF COMPLETES 6 MO PROB PERIOD PL. WILL DISM. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
